summary: A test in package github.com/cli/cli/v2/internal/prompter timed out: form.Run() did not complete before the test's timeout, causing the suite to fail.
root_cause: The test TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence (subtest selections_persist_after_changing_search_query) failed because form.Run() did not complete in time, causing the test to time out.

evidence.reason: Shows the top-level test that failed and that it timed out after ~5.19s.
Identifies the specific failing subtest and its duration.

evidence.quote: huh_prompter_test.go:478: form.Run() did not complete in time
evidence.reason: Concrete failure message from the test indicating form.Run() blocked or did not finish before the test timeout.
Indicates the package test run failed, causing the overall CI job to exit non-zero.

suggested_fix: Reproduce the failing test locally and investigate why form.Run() blocks (e.g. run: go test -v ./internal/prompter -run TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence). Add logging or adjust mocks/inputs so form.Run() can complete, or increase the test timeout if the operation legitimately needs more time.
